{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323183204F08DA6521F0968074E97"}"},"total":1237},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7518672466150048574","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者很赞😎，首先文章写的有考据，有地图，而且及时更新，让读者看得很清楚，然后很欢乐，很有梗，而且喜欢乱丢梗让读者参与，最后情节合理，节奏很均衡，我不喜欢历史类书很无脑，总之五星"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1750586109,"group_id":"7476642737849125950","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"职业看书的","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N91JFn5J+E/t+cVns8oh6Ev/kS/wbYIfTQrz0droQXop","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/dabf7119ccd341f69ff33a391fa06117~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793489&x-signature=yOKfHpWw0C9Wx5C%2BVDgG1072ewY%3D","user_id":"4374299452119049","user_name":"乌兹哔茨"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4374299452119049","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7476642737849125950","book_info":{"abstract":"原名《三国渣男，开局捡尸华雄》。捡尸就能升级，王通穿越成汉末华雄帐下小兵，意外获得“捡尸升级”系统，可以通过触摸死尸获取死者的技能。
　　开局之初，适逢汜水关前关羽斩华雄，冒死获取华雄的技能。
　　虎牢关前，跟在吕布后面捡尸……
　　此后，收武将，纳谋士，逐鹿中原，争霸天下；拒北胡、灭东倭，荡涤四方，终成大帝。
　　本书有系统，但仍然是以权谋为主。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4d412aa189b171ac7bc37e5bb14a4dc0","author":"山风木鱼","author_id":"","book_id":"7476642737849125950","book_name":"摸尸就变强，吊打三国谋士猛将","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281008","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7476643329501823550","read_count":"17696","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1315917"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"586","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,穿越,三国,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9c41d3a78e1b26b0404badb713ec35a8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779445924&x-signature=Ze68QERNpSOPUVynjOR%2Bm%2Bw2LwQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"11040584678","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"261"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323183204F08DA6521F0968074E97"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读17小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_durat
